hero.name: Miguel Martins
hero.title: I create stuff for the web...
hero.description: I am a full-stack developer based near Lisbon, Portugal. My enthusiasm lies in programming, downhill biking, and creating new sounds. Driven by an insatiable curiosity, I am committed to constantly expanding my knowledge and perfecting my skills, always with attention to detail.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.gravity_description: A game where players jump over obstacles to gain score and try to catch snacks to gain lives and also score. The game ends when the lives are over or when is reached a score of 100 points.
projects.pawsitivehomes_description: An online, searchable database of animals who need homes. We are a refuge of hope and joy for our furry friends.
projects.groovegrid_description: A music application that allows you to create a personalized experience tailored to your musical taste.
projects.setubal_description: A website featuring my favorite attractions in Setúbal: Arrábida, its beaches, and its gastronomy.
projects.mfpmartins_description: My personal portfolio website — the one you're browsing right now. Built with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Three.js, and Framer Motion. Deployed on AWS.

about.heading: About Me
about.bio: I am a full-stack developer based near Lisbon, Portugal. My enthusiasm lies in programming, downhill biking, and creating new sounds. Driven by an insatiable curiosity, I am committed to constantly expanding my knowledge and perfecting my skills, always with attention to detail.

contact.heading: Get In Touch
contact.cta: I'm always open to new opportunities and collaborations. Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, feel free to reach out!
